text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the day Nishino Flower starts training in
earnest for her debut in the Twinkle Series!
choice_data_list: (I'll put together a regimen right away!)
(I'll put together a regimen right away!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite my lack of knowledge and experience,
she accepted me as her trainer. With her future in
my hands, I know what I have to do.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that's work my fingers to the bone—I'll simply
overcome my shortcomings with effort. Just as I
feel my resolve renewed...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hello, Trainer! Working hard as always, I see!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Today, our journey together finally begins, so I
wanted to come and greet you properly.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I, Nishino Flower, will put everything I have into
this! Let's do our best!
choice_data_list: Excellent! I'll be counting on you!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Right! And... I know we don't start training until
the afternoon, but...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
If you haven't had lunch yet, I thought you might
be interested in trying this.
choice_data_list: Is that...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yup, I made a bento box!
choice_data_list: And you're giving it to me?
And you're giving it to me?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Of course. I made it especially for you... So please
accept it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower's bento box includes rolled
omelettes, rice balls, a stewed side dish, and a
bean salad, all arranged appetizingly.
choice_data_list: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...How does it taste?
choice_data_list: It's delicious!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yay! ♪
choice_data_list: The stewed side dish is very rich in flavor.
The stewed side dish is very rich in flavor.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
You mean the butterbur and deep-fried tofu? I
prepared them yesterday, so the flavor had time
to really soak through! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Please tell me how you prefer your food to be
seasoned. I'll do my best to match your tastes
next time!
choice_data_list: You're planning to make me lunch again?
You're planning to make me lunch again?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
As long as you don't mind. I love to cook, but
more than anything...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
It makes me happy to see people smile as they
eat the things I made for them.
choice_data_list: I appreciate the kindness!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After Nishino Flower and I eat lunch together, we
jump right into her training.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower zooms down the track. Though
small in stature, I get a sense of her innate talent
by how hard she runs. Not to mention...
choice_data_list: (She's blisteringly fast!)
(She's blisteringly fast!)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...
choice_data_list: Great running out there!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Do you really think so? Thank you!
choice_data_list:
I see why you were accepted here at such a
young age.

I see why you were accepted here at such a
young age.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Y-you're praising me too much... I'm still a long
way from where I want to be!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower was granted early admission to
Tracen Academy. That in and of itself is an
amazing accomplishment.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But the fact that she skipped a few grades comes
with its own set of concerns...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, Trainer, Nishino Flower. Sorry to
interrupt your training.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Is something wrong, Tazuna?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Can you spare some time once your session is
over? The infirmary doctor would like to have a
word with you about Nishino Flower's physique.

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text:
As you are aware, Nishino Flower enrolled at
Tracen Academy earlier than most students.

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text:
The decision was based on both her impressive
talent and the fact that she was determined to be
entering her race-ready stage.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Being "race-ready" refers to an Umamusume's
period of physical development. It's during this
time that their ability as an athlete grows
dramatically.

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text:
Simply put, Nishino Flower is already more than
capable of competing in races. However...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Compared to the other students, my body still
has a lot of growing left to do... Right?

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text:
Exactly. I believe this was already discussed with
you and your parents prior to your enrollment.

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text: Trainer, her body is already in a state of flux.

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text:
That's why I implore you to factor in her physical
state when making decisions on her training and
races. I trust you'll do what you believe is best for
her.
choice_data_list: I understand.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower is the age of an elementary school
student. Naturally, she doesn't compare
physically to the others starting their racing
careers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There may be times in the future where that
leaves her at a disadvantage, but for the time
being...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But it's fine for me to keep running, right? I'll just
have to train hard to make up for any physical
differences!

text_block_list.name: Infirmary Doctor
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that's a great mindset to have. I'm sure you'll
become a splendid Umamusume. Good luck.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I'll do my best. I promise!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I know it won't be easy, but I'll find a way to rise
above any hardships!
choice_data_list: I'll do my part, too!
I'll do my part, too!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'm going to work even harder than you will!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
And, um, on that note... I still have plenty of
energy left over, so can I do some extra training?
choice_data_list: Let's not overdo it on the first day.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, okay...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I understand. Are you going to take the rest of
the day off, too?
choice_data_list: I think I'll do some studying.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Studying?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While there's nothing keeping her from starting
her career, Nishino Flower's circumstances are
quite special and require extra attention.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That means I need to continue learning every day
so that I'm ready to tackle any unforeseen
problems that might pop up. After all...
choice_data_list: I'm still pretty new at this, you see.
I'm still pretty new at this, you see.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
choice_data_list: I'll see you tomorrow, then!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, yes! Have a nice night!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (Trainer didn't sound all too confident...)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(Despite being so small and inexperienced,
Trainer told me I'd do fine and agreed to guide
me.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(There's got to be a way for me to repay such
kindness and help Trainer gain some courage and
confidence.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: But how do I do that?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Is something the matter, Flower?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, I'm sorry! I just got a little lost in my thoughts!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(This is Grass Wonder. She's kind and has a gentle
nature, and she's a fellow member of the
groundskeeping committee.)

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
There's no need to apologize. Just let me know if
there's anything you don't understand about your
duties.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate that—thank you! I'll go water the
flowers now.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hm? ...Wait a minute. This flower bed is empty.
But there was moss phlox growing here before.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it seems there are no plans to grow anything
new in that flower bed for now.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
If you have any ideas for how to use it, please let
me know.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(A new flower bed... It sure would be pretty if all
kinds of flowers were blooming in it.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(Hehe! Watching flowers try their hardest to
bloom always gives me so much courage.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Perhaps if I work really, really hard, then...
